title: ToyMaker
description:
This is a walking simulator, relax and enter the world of the Toy Maker.
Explore lost areas and hidden passages to discover the secrets of the unknown Japanese lost game: Toy Maker.
Every game session is very dynamic so unlocking levels and secrets might take lot of tries depending on luck.Main game features • Use headphones for better immersion
 
• Use arrow keys to walk, no WASD for a more retro feel
 
• ALT+F4 to close
 
• Ported to Windows 7+
 
• Explore creepy surroundings
 
• Discover secrets out of bounds
 
• Jumpscares
 
• Walking simulator
 
• More levels will be added in future updates
description_short: A creepy lost-media videogame from the past will haunt your dreams.
